title: THE OTHER
body:
A revisit to the old but gold, HBM's Nuclear Tech, brought to 1.21.1! Heavy WIP, and probably won't see progress for a while

Explore nuclear physics, play with simulated RBMK reactors, and send nukes on a rocket!

Expect a massive, complicated tech tree, with many machines. 

Be careful with radiation, as you can destroy anything and everything! Items, blocks, and chunks all have their own simulated radiation levels that impact one another. Use decontaminators, Rad-X, and other resources to reduce radiation exposure

To get a guide book, install patchouli, and then in-game, craft the THE OTHER Field Guide!

Find the original mod [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hbms-nuclear-tech-mod).
